items.a: Orientation Week runs for 5 days starting the first Monday of the semester. Day 1 is campus tour and ID card collection, Day 2 is faculty introductions, Day 3 is club/society fair, Day 4 is library & IT systems training, and Day 5 is a welcome social event.

items.q: What should I bring on the first day?
items.a: Bring your admission letter, NIC/passport, 2 passport-size photos, and proof of fee payment to collect your student ID card.
Yes, orientation is compulsory for all new students — attendance is tracked and required for full enrollment status.
